home.title: Report issues. Track fixes. Improve your city.
home.featureQuickText: Submit photos, category, and location details in under a minute.
home.featureTrackText: Follow status updates and comments from submission to resolution.
home.featureCleanText: Help municipalities prioritize road, lighting, and waste improvements.
home.feedEmpty: No public reports match your filters yet.
home.heroTitle: Report city issues with a clean, modern experience
home.heroLead: City Care helps citizens submit issues quickly and stay informed while municipalities keep neighborhoods safer, greener, and better maintained.
home.communityLead: Open reports from across the city (submitted or in progress). Filter by area or category, or open the map for a full view.
home.feedNoMatch: No open reports match these filters. Try clearing district or category.
home.feedEmptyPublic: No public reports yet. Signed-in citizens can submit the first one.

myReports.title: My reports
myReports.lead: Track everything you have submitted and open any report for full details.
myReports.emptyNoneHint: Report an issue in your area and follow its progress here.
myReports.emptyFilterHint: No {{status}} reports on this page. Try another filter or page.

createReport.title: Report a new issue
createReport.lead: Describe the problem, pin the exact spot on the map, and add photos so your district team can act quickly.
createReport.descriptionPlaceholder: What is wrong? Include details that help the team find and fix the issue.
createReport.mapHint: GPS, clicking the map, or dragging the pin updates coordinates and, when possible, fills governorate, district, and location description from that point. You can still edit the description and other fields by hand.
createReport.matchingPin: Matching governorate and district to the pin…
createReport.coordsHint: Coordinates follow GPS, the map pin, and district view—they cannot be typed manually. Moving the pin (or GPS) also tries to set governorate and district to match the coordinates.
createReport.photosSub: JPEG or PNG, up to 5 images
createReport.photosTap: Tap to choose from your device
createReport.nearbyLead: Same category and district within 500m (open reports only). Open a match to compare before you submit.
createReport.nearbyNeedFields: Choose category and district to check for nearby duplicates.
createReport.draftRestored: Your draft was restored after reload. Photos are not saved in the draft — attach them again before submitting.
createReport.needImage: Please attach at least one image.
createReport.outsideLebanon: Location must be within Lebanon. Move the pin or update the coordinates.
createReport.coordsMatchError: Could not match this point to governorate and district. Choose them manually or move the pin.
createReport.gpsDistrictMatchFailed: GPS is set, but we could not match this point to a district. Choose governorate and district manually.
createReport.gpsUnsupported: This browser does not support GPS location.
createReport.gpsOutsideLebanon: Your location is outside Lebanon. The pin was placed at the nearest point within Lebanon — adjust it if needed.
createReport.gpsDenied: Location access was denied. Allow location for this site in your browser settings.
createReport.gpsUnavailable: Your device could not determine a location.
createReport.gpsTimeout: Location request timed out. Try again with a clearer GPS signal (e.g. outdoors).
createReport.coordsReadonlyTitle: Set by moving the pin or changing district

reportDetail.statusPending: Your report was received and is waiting for review.
reportDetail.statusInProgress: The city team has started working on your report.
reportDetail.statusResolved: This issue is marked resolved. Thank you for helping improve your area.
reportDetail.statusRejected: This report was not accepted. Check the team note below for details.

help.title: Help & FAQ
help.lead: Everything you need to report issues clearly and follow them through to resolution.
help.quickNewReportDesc: Submit an issue with photos and map pin
help.quickCreateAccountDesc: Sign up to submit and track reports

submit.q: How do I submit a report?
submit.a: Open New report, choose a category, add a clear description and location details, place the pin on the map (coordinates update automatically), and attach at least one photo.

track.a: Go to My reports or Alerts. Status updates move from Submitted to In progress, Resolved, or Rejected. You will also receive notifications when something changes.

location.q: What if my location pin looks wrong?
location.a: Move the pin on the map or use Search until the marker matches the issue. Coordinates are read-only and always match the pin you set.

privacy.a: Your report is reviewed by the municipal team for the district and governorate you selected. Community map and explore views show public reports only.

tips.photos: Take photos in good light so damage or hazards are easy to see.
tips.pin: Place the map pin exactly where the issue is, not only near your current GPS fix.
tips.duplicates: Check similar nearby reports before submitting to avoid duplicates.
tips.oneIssue: Use one report per issue so teams can assign and close it clearly.

discover.title: District discover
discover.lead: Essays, heritage, local events, and reporting pulse — curated by your district team.
discover.chooseDistrictHint: Pick a governorate and district above to read local stories, events, and reporting stats.
discover.pulseLead: How residents are reporting issues in this district.
discover.noSpotlight: No editorial spotlight has been published for {{name}} yet. District admins can add essay, heritage notes, and local events from the admin panel.
discover.reportCta: See something that needs fixing in this district?

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.lead: Status updates on your reports, plus comments and likes from the community.
notifications.emptyHint: When your reports are updated, you will see alerts here.
notifications.markReadError: Could not mark notification as read
notifications.markAllError: Could not mark all as read
notifications.emptyUnread: You're all caught up — no unread notifications.
notifications.emptyStatusFilter: No notifications match this status filter.
notifications.emptyDefault: Submit a report to receive updates when admins change its status or citizens interact.

statusMsg.inProgress: Work has started on this report.
statusMsg.resolved: This report is marked as resolved.
statusMsg.rejected: This report was rejected. Review details for context.
statusMsg.pending: Report submitted and waiting for review.
